gist.headline: Business buzz with ContentAI
gist.blurb: ContentAI just sprouted in our app showcase! It's a slick new tool that auto-generates platform-optimized posts for Twitter and LinkedIn based on your business profile.
gist.summary: Added ContentAI, an AI-powered business content generation platform, to the community app showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover ContentAI in the greenhouse to easily generate optimized social media content for their businesses.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a business content generation app for social media. Visuals: Polly the bee wearing a tiny business tie, standing next to a retro computer showing social media posts. The Nomnom creature eating a stack of 'boring business documents' and spitting out colorful social media posts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny business tie, standing next to a retro computer monitor displaying colorful social media posts. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of boring business documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
